name: LV_099_01_SRVNUMS
definition:
CREATE VIEW [DBO].[LV_099_01_SRVNUMS]
AS
WITH CTE
     AS (SELECT STOCKREF,
                V1.INVENNO,
                SRVN.DURATION,
                DATE_,
                0 ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                0 ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                SRV.CARDTYPE
           FROM    LV_099_01_STINVTOT_V1 V1 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_099_SRVCARD SRV
                ON (V1.STOCKREF = SRV.LOGICALREF)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_099_01_SRVNUMS SRVN
                ON (V1.STOCKREF = SRVN.CARDREF AND V1.INVENNO = SRVN.INVENNO)
          WHERE VARIANTREF = 0 AND TYP = 1
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                V2.INVENNO,
                SRVN.DURATION,
                DATE_,
                ACTPORDER,
                RECEIVED,
                ACTSORDER,
                V2.SHIPPED,
                SRV.CARDTYPE
           FROM    LV_099_01_STINVTOT_V2 V2 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_099_SRVCARD SRV
                ON (V2.STOCKREF = SRV.LOGICALREF)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_099_01_SRVNUMS SRVN
                ON (V2.STOCKREF = SRVN.CARDREF AND V2.INVENNO = SRVN.INVENNO)
          WHERE VARIANTREF = 0 AND TYP = 1
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                V3.INVENNO,
                SRVN.DURATION,
                DATE_,
                ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                SRV.CARDTYPE
           FROM    LV_099_01_STINVTOT_V3 V3 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_099_SRVCARD SRV
                ON (V3.STOCKREF = SRV.LOGICALREF)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_099_01_SRVNUMS SRVN
                ON (V3.STOCKREF = SRVN.CARDREF AND V3.INVENNO = SRVN.INVENNO)
          WHERE VARIANTREF = 0 AND TYP = 1
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                V5.INVENNO,
                SRVN.DURATION,
                DATE_,
                ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                SRV.CARDTYPE
           FROM    LV_099_01_STINVTOT_V5 V5 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_099_SRVCARD SRV
                ON (V5.STOCKREF = SRV.LOGICALREF)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_099_01_SRVNUMS SRVN
                ON (V5.STOCKREF = SRVN.CARDREF AND V5.INVENNO = SRVN.INVENNO)
          WHERE VARIANTREF = 0 AND TYP = 1)
  SELECT 1 AS LOGICALREF,
         STOCKREF AS CARDREF,
         INVENNO,
         SUM(DURATION) AS DURATION,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(ACTPORDER)
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(ACTSORDER)
            ELSE
               0
         END
            AS ORDERED,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(RECEIVED)
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(SHIPPED)
            ELSE
               0
         END
            AS SHIPPED,
         MIN(DATE_) AS LASTTRDATE
    FROM CTE
GROUP BY STOCKREF, INVENNO, CARDTYPE
UNION ALL
  SELECT 1 AS LOGICALREF,
         STOCKREF AS CARDREF,
         -1 AS INVENNO,
         SUM(0) AS DURATION,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(ACTPORDER * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(ACTSORDER * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            ELSE
               0
         END
            AS ORDERED,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(RECEIVED * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(SHIPPED * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            ELSE
               0
         END
            SHIPPED,
         MIN(DATE_) AS LASTTRDATE
    FROM CTE CTEALS INNER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WH ON CTEALS.INVENNO = WH.NR
   WHERE WH.FIRMNR = 099
GROUP BY STOCKREF, CARDTYPE
